definition: Degree to which the system contains semi-independent units with structured boundaries
measurement_note: Assess whether disturbance can be localized without total isolation

definition: Functional backup capacity for critical functions
measurement_note: Count backup pathways that are maintained usable and meaningfully independent

definition: Clarity about dependencies across nodes systems sectors and communities
measurement_note: Map physical digital financial ecological institutional and social dependencies

definition: Ability to separate a failing component without disabling the whole
measurement_note: Review islanding service isolation fallback procedures firebreaks and quarantine capacity

definition: Ability to coordinate across modules during stress
measurement_note: Assess protocols standards mutual aid authority information sharing and escalation rules

definition: Extent to which containment protects vulnerable groups rather than isolating or abandoning them
measurement_note: Use disaggregated exposure backup access repair priority and community participation

definition: Exposure of multiple modules or backups to the same underlying failure source
measurement_note: Map shared suppliers platforms fuels regions authorities assumptions and infrastructure
